getStarted.title: Choose how you want to continue
getStarted.description: Select your role to follow the correct and secure entry flow for your school.

superAdmin.title: Super Admin
superAdmin.description: Manage schools, school admins, global activity logs and platform governance.

schoolAdmin.title: School Admin
schoolAdmin.description: Review access requests, manage school members, and handle school operations.

schoolUser.title: School User
schoolUser.description: Submit an access request or log in with OTP if your request has already been approved.
schoolUser.secondaryAction: Already approved? Log in with OTP

footer.desc: A clean, modern platform for career guidance, learning discovery, and professional growth.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get product updates and practical articles.

hero.name: Fanuos
hero.title: Guiding Students to Their Brightest Future
hero.desc: A comprehensive career guidance platform helping schools, counselors, and students make informed decisions through data-driven assessments and personalized recommendations.

features.title: Everything You Need for Career Guidance
features.desc: Powerful tools designed for schools, counselors, students, and parents to work together effectively.

assess.title: Data-Driven Assessments
assess.desc: Comprehensive questionnaires with intelligent scoring and analysis.

ai.title: Personalized Recommendations
ai.desc: AI-powered career and major suggestions tailored to each student.

multi.title: Multi-Tenant Platform
multi.desc: Separate portals for schools, counselors, students, and parents.

reports.title: Comprehensive Reports
reports.desc: Detailed analytics and insights for informed decision-making.

roles.title: Built for Everyone
roles.desc: Tailored experiences for each role in the career guidance journey.

students.title: Students
students.desc: Take assessments, view recommendations, and plan your future.

counselors.title: Counselors
counselors.desc: Guide students with data-driven insights and counseling tools.

admins.title: School Admins
admins.desc: Manage users, assignments, and access comprehensive reports.

parents.title: Parents
parents.desc: Stay informed about your child's career exploration journey.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.desc: Monitor class progress and support student development.

super.title: Super Admin
super.desc: Manage tenants, billing, and platform-wide settings.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Support
bilingual.desc: Full support for English and Persian with RTL/LTR.

wcag.title: WCAG AA Compliant
wcag.desc: Accessible to all users with high contrast and keyboard navigation.

cta.title: Ready to Guide Your Students?
cta.desc: Join hundreds of schools using Fanous to help students discover their potential.
